Okay, welcome to Module 5. So now that we've gotten our prospects intimately acquainted with their current reality, the reality they should be experiencing, and the belief shifts that empower and fuel that reality, it's time to really introduce them to the escape vehicle that actually delivers it, which you can probably guess by now is your actual product. So it's finally time to reveal it and really invite your prospect to exit that gap, which they have no business remaining stuck in by this point. So here are the three sections we're going to tackle in the exiting the gap workshop session. So this is going to be your product reveal. It's going to be your product tour, Disney inspired product tour, as well as the Golden Guarantee to really tie it all together. But before we get started, as usual, make sure you have your workbooks close by, particularly section eight of the Launch Bible, which if you saved until now, is really going to be a big chunk of what we're doing in this workshop session. So pull it out. If you haven't done that exercise yet, I'm going to give a little more information and detail in the Aladdin product tour lesson. If you do have it, keep that handy. And when you're ready, let's get started.
